violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the produce spinner was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the bar in between bays of 3 bay sink (area cleaned during time of inspection) and the hot plates on hot holding units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Food contact surface of equipment/utensil onion slicer was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Onions slicer was cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Pickles were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Pickles were moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The ice machine was observed leaking at the time of inspection. The pipe was observed to be too short to reach the drain. Per PIC service call has been made. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The whopper freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The floors throughout the storage area and freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer, and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrective Action - Ice Machine was emptied. Establishment to provide RIDOH evidence of cleaned ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The Thermometer in the walk in refrigeration unit is not operational. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

A bag of ice was observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Bag of ice was voluntarily disposed of by establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The Sliding door lid to the freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. The back gasket on the ice machine was in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The 1 door chicken low boy was observed in poor repair (leaking). Equipment must me maintained in good repair. Gaskets on the one door low boy, milk shake fridge were in poor repair. All gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The hand sink was slow to drain. Drainage should not be slow. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of under the freezer shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the slop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The floor by the slop sink has an has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The tile flooring through out the facility has cracks, areas of low grout and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving around the hot water tank, and behind soft serve machine is in poor repair. Coving must be maintained in good repair. The counter by the take out window is in poor repair. Counter must be resurfaced to be smooth durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
